Dialogue: A massive astromagnetic storm is approaching!
Will our transport system be able to handle it...?
We have to prepare immediately!
I hear an astromagnetic storm is on its way...
I hope the storm doesn't cause too much damage...
The storm hit us hard... We have to work fast to get back on our feet.
Good work, everyone!
Mission accomplished! Time to pack everything up!
The alert's been lifted! Good work, everyone!
We've managed to complete repairs─now all that's left is to tidy up.
Seems the alert's been lifted. You can leave the rest to us!
Has the alert been lifted? Good. Now to get everything back where it belongs.
Bring the materials over here!
A massive astromagnetic storm is approaching!
The delicate equipment might not make it through...
We'll have to prepare for the worst!
Prioritize retrieving the drones and gathering the erupted aether!
Something's going on with the underground aether currents...
Could it be related to the magnetic fluctuations caused by the storm?
Where are those drones...?
Haven't seen them anywhere...
A meteor shower is headed right for us!
It might damage our facilities and equipment...
We must safeguard the essentials first!
Focus on clearing out the meteorite debris!
A meteor shower is headed right for us!
It could cause irreperable damage to the surface...
We have to act swiftly and fix the problems as they arise!
I understand a meteor shower is coming.
But I shouldn't have anything to worry about underground, right?
Gas is leaking from underground! We need all the help we can muster!
That was excellent work, everyone!
Mission accomplished! Time to pack everything up!
The alert's been lifted! Everyone's hard work saw us through!
There's been a sharp rise of harmful spores in the air!
We'll barely be able to see our hands in front of our faces...
We must remain calm!
Is that a mutant specimen? We must analyze it right away!
There's been a sharp rise of harmful spores in the air!
We have to stop them from spreading...
We'll be in trouble if the spores keep multiplying...
Is this all because of the sporing mist? Stay safe out there!
So this is where it all begins...
Better take plenty of photos before all this changes!
Time for our daily calisthenics!
Hup, hup! Hup, hup!
Hup, hup!
Let's check the schedule...
What a sight to behold...

This is it, the start
of a grand endeavor!
I can't wait to get to work!
We have such a wonderful opportunity here.
I know, this is all so exciting!
Hmm, what needs doing?
Photographic perfection!
Keep at it, you lot!
Careful with the vacuums, there!
Let's make sure this rock is leveled!

Don't worry, I've got
this under control!
This is one stubborn rock!
Gah, my drill must be blunt...
Right away!
Behold... the base camp!
Time for a commemorative photo!
Three, two, one, snap!
We did it!
Hooray!

Right on schedule...
All the hard work is paying off!
Our efforts'll go down in the annals!
We're making real strides here!
Has Archon loaf always been this...gritty?
You must be diligent in your checks!
Keep up the great work, everyone!
Mini rover status: fully functional!
Seems that latest round of calibration did the trick...
This way, please!
This way...
All present and accounted for!
Behold...the Cosmoliner!
I just hope we get a proper canteen... I'm sick and tired of Archon loaf.
It's heartening to see all the progress being made!
I know. It feels like a new structure pops up every day.
Did you visit the new facilities?
I did! A true feat of engineering!

A job well done,
and a cup well brewed!
Hehe, how exciting!
Don't forget─safety is paramount!
Keep an eye on those couplings!
Snippity-snappity!
Excellent. Proceed to the next phase!

You're full of beans today.
Must be that freshly charged battery pack...
At last, we have a cosmoport!
Let's see some smiles!
Make sure you get my good side!
Hmm...we seem to be missing one.
Where could they have gone?
<yawn>
I hope someone appreciates how neat these welds are...
Steady now, steady...
Behold...the mech hangar!
Improve our installations and we broaden our explorations!
Hmm, I wonder how the schedule's looking...
No issues detected with this latest shipment.
I'd kill for a home-cooked meal...
The pace of construction is astonishing!
Honestly, the hub's beginning to feel just like home.
It's incredible watching the engineers at work.

I couldn't agree more.
So swift, so efficient!
You're the best mech a man could ask for.
Let's polish your friend till it shines!
Huzzah! Another perfect weld.
Hmm, I think someone needs their battery pack recharged...
The Moongate Hub's coming on in leaps and bounds!
And they finally installed vending machines!
So, once the water supply is established...
We can make soup to wash down all the wretched Archon loaf!
Behold...Base Camp Gamma!
Behold...the hydrofication station!
Behold...Cosmoport Beta!
The mech pilots always look so dashing...
You can tell who the veterans are from a malm away!
I'm ready to explore new <Emphasis>culinary</Emphasis> frontiers...
Our work here on the moon's almost done.
Just one final push!
Have you ventured outside the base camp yet?
I have! I'm intrigued to know whether any of those fungi are edible...
At last, the Moongate Hub is fully functional!
Ah, complete at last.
I hope things go as smoothly wherever we end up next.
Ahh, you can't beat a piping hot bowl of soup!
Shipped all the way from Etheirys, no less!
I wish I had a slice of Archon loaf...
I wonder where the initiative's headed next?
I can't wait to find out!
Huzzah! Our lunar aspirations have been realized!
Here's to more missions together, my mechanized friend!
Shine brighter than any star!
It's calling to me... My destiny...
This is my chance...!
Hey!
Climb down before you hurt yourself!
Any shipments from Etheirys?
I'm afraid you'll have to be more specific...
Er...where am I meant to put this?
The taste of home is...well, a bit bland.
But <Emphasis>full</Emphasis> of essential nutrients.
You there─have you some time to spare?
Er... I-I have to fluff my tail, so...
My colleagues from the Studium should arrive soon.
That's wonderful news!
The Cosmoliner's complete and expansion continues apace!
Nothing can stop us!
I do hope we have enough...
Head to the next project site on the double!
Say no more!
Thank you for your hard work.
Will a mini rover suffice...?
And thus shall we continue excavating!
Understood!
Understood!
This is our designated area.
Understood!
Understood!
Confirming visual data...
I hear the other areas are doing well.
Work on the moon, they said.
Wh-Where should I put this?
And soon we'll be even further afield...
They say a giant lift will go here.
There's much yet to be done beforehand.
I can't wait to see it!
This is just the beginning...
We came for the moon, and <Emphasis>this</Emphasis> is the moon.
I feel like a true cosmic explorer!
Soil enhancement is proceeding nicely, I see.
That's quite the distance to travel.
Made the commute both safe and sound!
Zoom! Just like a starship!
Where are those materials that just arrived?
Were they over here?
This way to the Moongate Hub!
Another inspection request...
Good. Transmissions are active.
This is working properly...right?
Carrots...check!
Archon loaf...check!
Next we have to transport materials.
I'll drive!
Drive safely...
Given these environs...
I know. We must take all due caution.
Is all in order?
Yes, the first shipment should be ready to go.
Nobody will notice me here...
Oof... Where does this belong?
Let me check...
One, two, three, four!
Five, six, seven, eight...
Having the Cosmoliner makes all the difference.
Our hard work really paid off!
Hm-hm-hmmm～♪
Boop, boop!

Battery packs, check.
Supplies, check...
Projections indicate we'll hit our supply targets.
●移動して、場所チェック
Mechanical supplies go over there!
If only my family could see this...
●仲間に報告に返答
●移動して荷物チェック
●戻って仲間に報告
Our plans are proceeding swimmingly!
Progress in action!
I think this is all we can take...
We'll transport the rest separately.
<Emphasis>I AM THE DRILL MASTER!</Emphasis>
That's the spirit! Keep going!
Quality assurance... My favorite...
Do we still have time?
We have enough. Excellent.
My inspection proceeds apace!
An amazing tunnel, isn't it?
Yes, truly. Can you please take this from me already?
We can pierce a little further, methinks.
Next, we come to transportation...
Wait... I think we're missing one.
Are you sure you didn't miscount?
How fares the excavation?
Crush! Smash! DESTROY!
<blip> <bloop> <bleep>
Regarding our next project...
Type... Quantity...
The contents are fragile, so please have care.
Behold...Piercingway Tunnel!
Huzzah! Huzzah!
H-Huzzah!
Aaaaaa!
We seem to have enough.
This way to the surface!
To the surface...
Freedom...
So what's coming in the shipment? Besides Archon loaf, I mean.
Is that a new type of carrot? How exciting!
(Should I break the news...?)
An unidentified flying object! I swear it!

Mumukko's looking for me?
Ugh, not now! I'm busy!
Let me check the equipment rental deadline...
Psst! They're calling for you!
Five more minutes, I beg of you...
This fuel efficiency is...
Impossible, sir. With all due respect.
Now, if we had warp capabilities installed...
Mechs are just so...so <Emphasis>fantastic</Emphasis>!
You there! Back to work!
Hmm... What am I in the mood for?
The Loporrits are so wonderfully fuzzy!
Have you piloted before?
I-I haven't the courage...
I was thinking salad, or maybe soup.
Chock-full of carrots!
Excuse me, where shall I put this?
Just a moment, please!
Today I'm in the mood for...
Say, about the upcoming project...
Bizarre weather, I'm telling you...
Beautiful.
Space is so vast...
<sigh> Rest at last.
Well earned, if you ask me.
Oh my...
For the carrot seasoning, take care to...
N-No, it's delicious... (Urp...)
We all know that's not true...
The data we've gleaned is promising indeed.
Is this a new flavor?
I call it the lunar blend! What do you think of it?

Mmm... Not bad,
I suppose.

It must be in my
quarters─it <Emphasis>must</Emphasis>!
<sigh> I'll just file a lost property report...
I hear there's a new item in the vending machines.

At long last! I am a pilot!
<Emphasis>Zroooooom</Emphasis>!
These mechs aren't toys, you know.
I'm sorry... <sniff>
Perfect.
Perfect!

...Good enough,
I suppose.
Did you bring your exotablet?

Of course I did!
Why, it's right here in my...
Uh... I'll be right back.
Burn... Burn... Burn...!

Buffoons, all of them...
Have they honestly not a moment to spare?
Behold...the nadir lift!

Soil readings normal.
So far, so good.
If worse comes to worst, we can always dispatch the mechs.
What do these mechs look like, anyway?
Nothing like a special operation to get the blood pumping!
These vacuum suits are a sight to behold...
Can't let the mechs have all the glory!
Mission complete!
Tremendous work, truly.
Seems we're on the cusp of an irregular spongoi infestation.
Should we deploy the mechs for extermination?
Which mechs will they wheel out for this?
Let's crush 'em flat!
Leave the mechs to do their work while we take care of ours.
We'll handle the puny ones!
Great teamwork! Thanks again.
I'd love to pilot one of those things sometime.
